mnemonics.title: Abstraction vs Encapsulation
mnemonics.content: Abstraction hides implementation details, while encapsulation bundles data and methods

acronyms.usage: OOP is a programming paradigm that uses objects and classes to design software systems

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a car with a complex engine, but a simple interface to drive it

analogies.analogy: A pill box that bundles medicine and its instructions together
